---
title: "TinyLife Science Illustrations"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    lightbox: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## **You drifted into a microbial bloom... **

**... of illustrations** 😜

This page hosts a collection of microbes, their hosts, and grazers (eg. zooplankton). The drawings were designed to be used for teaching materials, presentations, and academic communication.

> If you would like to use an illustration, please contact me for permission. Academic use is generally permitted with attribution. Requests for other uses (commercial applications, logo designs, or designing a full custom figure) will require a consult and pricing!
>
>**For inquiries or permissions, please email:** <rkeyMicrobe@proton.me>
>
> Please put "art" in your subject line.

---

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Green Algae 

<div class="gallery-grid">

<div class="tile-card">

![](images/gre_1.png){width=100%}

<div class="tile-desc">
**Micrasterias hardyi**. Desmid. Also available as line art (no color).
</div>

</div>

<div class="tile-card">

![](images/gre_2.png){width=100%}

<div class="tile-desc">
**Tetmemorus laevis**. Also available as line art.
</div>

</div>

<div class="tile-card">

![](images/gre_3.png){width=100%}

<div class="tile-desc">
**Cosmarium**. Desmid. Also available as line art.
</div>

</div>

<div class="tile-card">

![](images/gre_4.png){width=100%}

<div class="tile-desc">
**Bathycoccus prasinos**. 
</div>

</div>


</div>

### Phytoplankton 

<div class="gallery-grid">

<div class="tile-card">

![](images/ph_1.png){width=100%}

<div class="tile-desc">
**Pseudo-nichtzchia**. Marine Diatom. Also available as line art (no color).
</div>

</div>


<div class="tile-card">

![](images/ph_2.png){width=100%}

<div class="tile-desc">
**Meridion circulare**. Freshwater Diatom. Also available as line art (no color).
</div>

</div>


<div class="tile-card">

![](images/ph_3.png){width=100%}

<div class="tile-desc">
**Unknown Diatom**. Marine Phytoplankton. Also available as line art (no color).
</div>

</div>


<div class="tile-card">

![](images/ph_4.png){width=100%}

<div class="tile-desc">
**Chaetoceros**. Marine Diatom. Also available as line art (no color).
</div>

</div>


<div class="tile-card">

![](images/ph_5.png){width=100%}

<div class="tile-desc">
**Chaetoceros Spp.**. Marine Diatom. Also available as line art (no color).
</div>

</div>


<div class="tile-card">

![](images/ph_6.png){width=100%}

<div class="tile-desc">
**Odontella**. Freshwater Diatom. Also available as line art (no color).
</div>

</div>


<div class="tile-card">

![](images/ph_7.png){width=100%}

<div class="tile-desc">
**Ditylum brightwelli**. Marine Diatom. Also available as line art (no color).
</div>

</div>


<div class="tile-card">

![](images/ph_8.png){width=100%}

<div class="tile-desc">
**Synechococcus**. Cyanobacteria. Also available as line art (no color).
</div>

</div>

</div>


---

### Bacteria


<div class="gallery-grid">

<div class="tile-card">

![](images/bac_1.png){width=100%}

<div class="tile-desc">
**Synechococcus**. Cyanobacteria. Also available as line art (no color).
</div>

</div>

<div class="tile-card">

![](images/bac_2.png){width=100%}

<div class="tile-desc">
**Prochlorococcus**. Cyanobacteria. Also available as line art (no color).
</div>

</div>

<div class="tile-card">

![](images/bac_3.png){width=100%}

<div class="tile-desc">
**Cyanobacteria**. Filamentous Nostoc. Also available as line art (no color).
</div>

</div>

<div class="tile-card">

![](images/bac_4.png){width=100%}

<div class="tile-desc">
**Chroococcus turgidus**. Cyanobacteria. Also available as line art (no color).
</div>

</div>

<div class="tile-card">

![](images/bac_5.png){width=100%}

<div class="tile-desc">
**Unknown Bacteria**. Also available as line art (no color).
</div>

</div>




</div>

---

### Hosts


---

### Zooplankton

<div class="gallery-grid">

<div class="tile-card">

![](images/zoo_tom.png){width=100%}

<div class="tile-desc">
**Polychaete worm**, genus Tomopteris.
</div>

</div>



<div class="tile-card">

![](images/zoo_jel.png){width=100%}

<div class="tile-desc">
**Narcomedusan** jelly, Hydrozoa. 
</div>

</div>



<div class="tile-card">

![](images/zoo_shr.png){width=100%}

<div class="tile-desc">
**Krill**, Euphausiid zooplankton grazer.
</div>

</div>



<div class="tile-card">

![](images/zoo.png){width=100%}

<div class="tile-desc">
**Marine Copepod**, lateral-view. Unknown genus.
</div>

</div>



<div class="tile-card">

![](images/zoo2.png){width=100%}

<div class="tile-desc">
**Calanoid copepod**, lateral-view. Unknown genus.
</div>

</div>

<div class="tile-card">

![](images/zoo3.png){width=100%}

<div class="tile-desc">
**Amphipod**, zooplankton crustacean
</div>

</div>

<div class="tile-card">

![](images/zoo4.png){width=100%}

<div class="tile-desc">
**Marine Zooplankton**, Unknown genus
</div>

</div>


</div>

---

### Figure Samples




### Line Art 

<div class="gallery-grid">

<div class="tile-card">

![](images/phyt3.png){width=100%}

<div class="tile-desc">
**Cyclotella**, available in black or white.
</div>

</div>


<div class="tile-card">

![](images/phyt2.png){width=100%}

<div class="tile-desc">
**Trigonium americanum**, available in black or white.
</div>

</div>


<div class="tile-card">

![](images/phyt4.png){width=100%}

<div class="tile-desc">
**Odeontella**, available in black or white.
</div>

</div>

<div class="tile-card">

![](images/phyt5.png){width=100%}

<div class="tile-desc">
**Triceratium**, available in black or white.
</div>

</div>

<div class="tile-card">

![](images/phyt6.png){width=100%}

<div class="tile-desc">
**Ditylum brightwelli**, available in black or white.
</div>

</div>

</div>

:::
